pattern: Same level grouping as the top-down sweep, but the result is ordered from the deepest level up to the root — collect normally, then flip the outer order.
hints: The values within each level are unchanged from a normal top-down grouping; only the order of the levels differs.
Build the levels top to bottom as usual, then reverse the list of levels so the bottom comes first.
Equivalently, insert each new level at the front of the result as you go.

edge_inputs.description: left-skewed chain so the deepest single node leads

stress.note: first element non-null so the root exists
